title: Vibrant Vanilla
description: Improved version of the vanilla version, adding better textures, animations and models.
body:
# **About This Modpack**

This modpack is designed to **enhance and optimize the vanilla Minecraft experience** while remaining fully **client-side**. It focuses on performance, visuals, and immersion — **without altering core gameplay or requiring any server-side installation.**

---

## 🚀 **Performance Enhancements**

This pack includes a collection of optimization mods that target:

* **Memory leak reduction**
* **Smoother frame pacing and higher FPS**
* **Faster chunk loading**
* **Reduced stuttering**
* **Improved game responsiveness**

Some mods included (like *Lithium*) *can* run server-side, but **the pack itself is strictly client-side**, ensuring full compatibility with vanilla servers.

---

## 🎨 **Visual Improvements**

The modpack upgrades visuals while staying faithful to the vanilla style:

* **Connected textures** for smoother, more natural block transitions
* **Stack-size–based item textures**, adding visual cues and immersion
* **Improved lily pad variety**, making rivers and swamps feel more alive
* **Enhanced foliage**, with denser and more vibrant leaves
* **Subtle 3D elements added to player skins**
* **New simple but clean third-person animations**
* **Improved first-person item-consumption animations and textures**

These visual upgrades aim to maintain Minecraft’s original charm while making the world feel richer and more detailed.

---

## 🎮 **Immersion & Quality of Life**

Beyond visuals and performance, the pack includes **light immersion-focused tweaks** such as:

* **Small animation refinements**
* **Better environmental variety**
* **More expressive character movement**
* **UI improvements**

All changes are **client-side only**, ensuring full compatibility with any server—vanilla, modded, or otherwise.

---

**And Much More…**
